title: AWT: Adventures With TARDISes
description: An Addon For Adventures in Time That Adds More Content To TARDISes
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72a2cdf7d794e9a4170ac33bf392f4090a4a1b99.png)

This AiT Addon is brought to you by the AWT Team!
Please check put the pages! We add quite a bit to AiT.

**The Current Team consists of:**
1. Founder, Main Dev: Deo
2. Current Owner: Leftisright
3. Founder, Main Dev: Dino
4. Modeller: Scarfo
5. Coders: EncData, Caleb
6. Assets: thetardisowner, BlueEnbyGamer, NathanGames2020 and Kitkatcae!
Special thanks to Theo and Duzo as well!


FOR SUGGESTIONS:
EncData's Server Has suggestions channel for awt even for bug fixes and its more active in a sense
[https://discord.gg/TqypjZyY6x](https://discord.gg/TqypjZyY6x)
